title: goodyera micrantha
intro: Goodyera micrantha, also known as the terrestrial lady's tresses, is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Goodyera micrantha include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve immune function. Goodyera micrantha can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
